title: Allahabad University CUET UG Online Registration 2026 - Apply Now
excerpt: Allahabad University is inviting online applications for CUET UG 2026. Eligible candidates can apply from 05 July 2026 to 16 July 2026. Read the notification for eligibility, course information, and admission procedure.
